# RANDSUM - Universal Dice Rolling Library

> Dice notation and rolling for tabletop RPGs. Works with D&D 5E, Blades in the Dark, PbtA, Daggerheart, Root RPG, Salvage Union, and more.

## Packages

- @randsum/roller - Core dice engine with built-in notation parser
- @randsum/games - Unified game package with subpath exports:
  - @randsum/games/fifth - D&D 5th Edition
  - @randsum/games/blades - Blades in the Dark
  - @randsum/games/pbta - Powered by the Apocalypse
  - @randsum/games/daggerheart - Daggerheart RPG
  - @randsum/games/root-rpg - Root RPG
  - @randsum/games/salvageunion - Salvage Union

## Quick Start

npm install @randsum/roller

roll() accepts number, notation string, options object, or multiple arguments:

roll(20)       // Number: 1d20
roll("4d6L")   // Notation: D&D ability score (4d6, drop lowest)
roll({ sides: 6, quantity: 4, modifiers: { drop: { lowest: 1 } } })  // Object: same as 4d6L
roll("2d20L+5") // Advantage attack roll
roll("2d6+3")   // PbtA / 2d6 + stat
roll("d%")      // Percentile: 1d100
roll("4dF")     // Fate Core: 4 Fate dice (-4 to +4)
roll("1d20", "2d6", "+5")  // Multiple: attack + damage + modifier
roll("5d6W")   // D6 System wild die (Star Wars D6)
roll("g6")     // Geometric die: roll until 1, return count
roll("3DD6")   // Draw die: 3 unique values from d6 pool
roll("4d6Lx6") // Repeat: generate 6 ability scores
roll("2d6+3[fire]+1d4[cold]")  // Annotations: label damage types
roll("4d6//2") // Integer division
roll("5d10F{3}") // Count failures <= 3

## Documentation

- skills/dice-rolling/SKILL.md - AI agent skill (agentskills.io format)
- packages/roller/RANDSUM_DICE_NOTATION.md - Complete notation reference

## Links

- Documentation: https://randsum.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/RANDSUM/randsum
- Notation reference: https://randsum.dev/packages/roller/
